title: Official 222 Promo Video Out Officially
wikitext:
[]: Official 2.22 Promo Video Out Officially [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:17 pm Here it is . You need to have Microsoft Silverlight installed to watch it. If you don't want to install Silverlight, you can watch it in Flash here ... assuming you can trick it into thinking you're in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:40 pm Someone youtube that sucker, please.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:45 pm Do you mean that minute long promo video everybody was fapping over (I know I was--Waiiit a minute. >_> ), or something new?

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:49 pm Would also like to know what this is, exactly. Edit: never mind, it turns out I have silverlight installed, somehow. Wow, the first 20 seconds was just the title lol. Anyway, it's a 2min clip set to Give Me Wings from the 2.0 soundtrack.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:24 pm It's the exact same video you'll find on the front page, except seeable. Just get silverlight, it's not hard to install. The reason they don't want us watching the flash stream is probably because gaijins are slightly more prone to ripping and putting stuff up on youtube. Extra publicity is an unwanted element in Khara's marketing machine.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:36 pm IDontWantNoScrub wrote: Wow, the first 20 seconds was just the title lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:45 pm It's the exact same video that was shown at TAF . Just better quality.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:46 pm Sweet. Can't wait to check this out.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:48 pm Also, you can download an avi of the video from the front page .

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:54 pm Very nice. I must admit that one reason I'm really anticipating 2.22 is that once the footage becomes available youtube is going to be filled with cool fanmade trailers (I love movie trailers in general).

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:03 pm Wonder if a HD version of this will be out

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:06 pm Heromaster111 wrote: Wonder if a HD version of this will be out

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:07 pm I know it would be nice tho

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:09 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Why bother? Only 6 weeks until the BD.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:43 pm IDontWantNoScrub wrote: Only?

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 11:49 pm Evangelion wrote: Yeah, thats what I was thinking.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 15, 2010 1:18 am Well, I guess that following our trailer => not spoiler policy, it would seem that pink plugsuit Mari is now no longer a spoiler.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Apr 15, 2010 1:19 am Pink Plugsuit Mari was a spoiler? Really?!

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Apr 15, 2010 1:46 am There are some much more serious spoilers in there. It basically gives away the climax. That must suck for people who are interested and haven't spoiled themselves yet. Both of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 15, 2010 1:57 am Heromaster111 wrote: Pink Plugsuit Mari was a spoiler? Really?!
